mapper.select: SELECT ID, NODE_NAME, LOOP_BACK_ADDR, MGMT_ADDR FROM IP_SDN.TB_NODE
SELECT ID, IF_NAME, NODE_ID, IP_ADDR, HW_IF_ID FROM IP_SDN.TB_INTERFACE
SELECT ID as Id, SIF_ID, RIF_ID, OSPF_METRIC, USAGED FROM IP_SDN.TB_LINK

SELECT N.ID AS SDN_NODE_ID , NM.NODE_NUM AS STRRESID, NM.NODE_NM AS STRRESNM , I.ID AS SDN_IF_ID, I.IF_NAME AS STRIFNM , PM.IF_NUM AS STRIFID , LT.TX_BIT_RATE AS FLTBPSOUT, LT.RX_BIT_RATE AS FLTBPSIN, LT.TX_PKT_RATE AS FLTPPSOUT, LT.RX_PKT_RATE AS FLTPPSIN , UO.NREN_ID, UO.NREN_NAME, LT.MEASURED_DATETIME, LT.ID FROM IP_SDN.TB_LINK_TRAFFIC LT INNER JOIN IP_SDN.TB_INTERFACE I ON LT.IF_ID = I.ID INNER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_PORT_MST PM ON PM.IF_ID = LOWER(I.IF_NAME) INNER JOIN IP_SDN.TB_NODE N ON I.NODE_ID = N.ID INNER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_NODE_MST NM ON N.ID = NM.IP_SDN_ID::INT LEFT OUTER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_USER_ORGAN UO ON UO.NODE_ID = NM.NODE_ID AND UO.IF_ID = PM.IF_ID WHERE PM.NODE_NUM = NM.NODE_NUM AND LT.ID > #{dataKey} ORDER BY LT.ID

SELECT N.ID AS SDN_NODE_ID , NM.NODE_NUM as STRRESID , NM.NODE_NM as STRRESNM , NF.CPU_USAGE as CpuUsage , NF.MEM_USAGE as MemUsage,NF.MEASURED_DATETIME as measured_datetime, NF.ID FROM IP_SDN.TB_NODEFACTOR NF INNER JOIN IP_SDN.TB_NODE N ON NF.NODE_ID = N.ID INNER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_NODE_MST NM ON N.ID = NM.IP_SDN_ID::INT WHERE NF.ID > #{dataKey} ORDER BY NF.ID

SELECT COLLECT_SEQ as collectSeq, COLLECT_HOST as collectHost, SOURCE, APPNAME, HOSTNAME, FACILITY_CODE as facilityCode, FACILITY, SEVERITY_CODE as severityCode, SEVERITY, SYSLOG_MESSAGE as syslogMessage, SYSLOG_PROCID as syslogProcid, COLLECT_TIMESTAMP as collectTimestamp FROM GATHER.TB_SYSLOG_COLLECT WHERE COLLECT_SEQ > #{collectSeq} AND COLLECT_TIMESTAMP > rca.fc_get_minus_time(1) ORDER BY COLLECT_SEQ

SELECT COLLECT_SEQ as collectSeq, COLLECT_HOST as collectHost, AGENT_ADDRESS as agentAddress, ETHER_TYPE as etherType, HEADER_PROTOCOL as headerProtocol, INPUT_IFINDEX as inputIfindex, OUTPUT_IFINDEX as outputIfindex, SAMPLE_DIRECTION as sampleDirection, SRC_IP as srcIp, SRC_MAC as srcMac, SRC_PORT as srcPort, SOURCE_ID_TYPE as sourceIdType, SOURCE_ID_INDEX as sourceIdIndex, DST_IP as dstIp, DST_MAC as dstMac, DST_PORT as dstPort, PACKET_BYTES as packetBytes, PACKET_DROPS as packetDrops, FRAME_LENGTH as frameLength, HEADER_LENGTH as headerLength, IP_DSCP as ipDscp, IP_ECN as ipEcn, IP_FLAGS as ipFlags, IP_FRAGMENT_OFFSET as ipFragmentOffset, IP_TOTAL_LENGTH as ipTotalLength, IP_TTL as ipTtl, SAMPLING_RATE as samplingRate, TCP_HEADER_LENGTH as tcpHeaderLength, TCP_URGENT_POINTER as tcpUrgentPointer, TCP_WINDOW_SIZE as tcpWindowSize, COLLECT_TIMESTAMP as collectTimestamp FROM GATHER.TB_SFLOW_COLLECT WHERE COLLECT_SEQ > #{collectSeq} AND COLLECT_TIMESTAMP > rca.fc_get_minus_time(1) ORDER BY COLLECT_SEQ
SELECT ALARMNO, ALARMTIME, NODE_NUM , NODE_NM, ALARMMSG, ALARMLVL, ETC, RULE_ID FROM RCA.TB_SYSLOG_ALARM_MST WHERE ALARMNO::INTEGER > #{dataKey} ORDER BY ALARMNO
